claims.text: Subject 16 (female, age 23 days at initial consult) carries c.1935C>A (p.Asp645Glu) on one allele and combined pseudodeficiency alleles c.1726G>A/c.2065G>A on the other allele, with GAA=2.3, Hex4=5, CK=108, AST=103, ALT=40, and is classified as a Carrier.

citations.quote: 16 | F | 23 | 2.02 | 1.07 | c.1935C>A (p.Asp645Glu) | combined pseudodef alleles c.1726G>A(p.Gly576Ser)/c.2065G>A(p.Glu689Lys) | 2.3 | 5 | 108 | 103 | 40 | | | Carrier

claims.text: Subject 38 (male, age 21 days at initial consult) carries c.1935C>A (p.Asp645Glu) on one allele and c.2065G>A (p.Glu689Lys) on the other allele, with GAA=3.2, Hex4=3.3, CK=69, AST=93, ALT=32, and is classified as a Carrier.

Subject 7 (female, Late Onset diagnosis) carries c.-32-13T>G on allele 1 and an allele 2 that appears garbled in the table but contains repeated instances of 'c.1935C>A (p.Asp645Glu)' interspersed with text resembling c.260C>T (p.Arg84X); this entry is uncertain due to OCR/formatting artifact but suggests possible involvement of the variant. Initial EKG and echo both showed hypertrophy.

citations.quote: 7 | F | 17 | 1.28 | 0.63 | c.-32-13T>G | c.2c.1935C>A (p.Asp645Glu)60C>T (p.Arg8c.1935C>A (p.Asp645Glu)4X) | 3 | 4.5 | 421 | 125 | 50 | Hypertrophy | Hypertrophy | Late Onset

claims.text: In this cohort, carriers (including those heterozygous for a single GAA variant with no second pathogenic allele) are not considered affected, and no reports of affected carriers are known according to the authors.

citations.quote: Carriers have about 50% of the average normal enzyme activity [6]; to our knowledge, there are no reports of affected carriers.
